nasb.text: Then Jeremiah said to the house of the Rechabites, “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, ‘Because you have obeyed the command of Jonadab your father, kept all his commands and done according to all that he commanded you;

esv.text: But to the house of the Rechabites Jeremiah said, “Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: Because you have obeyed the command of Jonadab your father and kept all his precepts and done all that he commanded you,

cnv.text: 耶利米對利甲族人說：“萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘因為你們聽從了你們祖先約拿達的吩咐，謹守他的一切命令，又照著他吩咐你們的一切去行。’

ccb.text: 然后，耶利米对利甲族人说：“以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，‘你们听从祖先利甲的儿子约拿达的吩咐，遵守他的一切命令，
